title: [codereview-pass3] propagation.py: dead commented code and missing trailing commas
description: max_range has 3 lines of commented-out math derivation (ERA001 - violates no dead code rule). Also COM812 missing trailing comma in can_decode and max_range function defs. These are P4 style/consistency issues. Fix by removing comments (move to docstring if useful) and adding commas. Also update tests if needed but scope limited to propagation.py. File: python/src/lichen/sim/propagation.py:144,167,182-184
